items.title: To celebrate the launch of GPT-5.6 Sol, we will reset the rate limits again (twice) acros…
items.title_zh: 为了庆祝 GPT-5.6 Sol 的推出，我们将再次（两次）重置速率限制……
items.description: To celebrate the launch of GPT-5.6 Sol, we will reset the rate limits again (twice) across ChatGPT Work and Codex over the next 24 hours. We want you to have the time to truly try ambitious tasks and get the hang of it. Happy exploring!
items.description_zh: 为了庆祝 GPT-5.6 Sol 的发布，我们将在接下来的 24 小时内再次（两次）重置 ChatGPT Work 和 Codex 的速率限制。我们希望您有时间真正尝试雄心勃勃的任务并掌握其中的窍门。快乐探索！

items.description: Personal update: I’ve joined @Meta to build AI products. While SWE agents have transformed software engineering, agents in most other complex systems are still early. Most people haven’t yet felt the full power of AI agents. Meta is well p…
items.description_zh: 个人更新：我加入了@Meta来构建AI产品。虽然 SWE 代理已经改变了软件工程，但大多数其他复杂系统中的代理仍处于早期阶段。大多数人还没有感受到人工智能代理的全部力量。 Meta 很好…
